test_cases.input_summary: Breaking news — rail operator cancels 240 trains per day indefinitely after wage talks with drivers' union collapse; 12% pay rise demanded, eight intercity routes affected, government calls for return to table.

Investigative feature — three water companies discharged sewage for 2.1 million hours (up 34%), paid executives £14.3m in bonuses; fined £18m (under 1% of profit); proposed legislation would raise maximum fine to 10% of turnover.

Policy analysis — government's free childcare expansion from 9 months (September launch) depends on recruiting 45,000 new workers; three analysts say target unrealistic given current pay and training pipelines.
